allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: commit inicial do Dashboard Financeiro

Dashboard Streamlit para gestão financeira da Brocks Empreendimentos,
desenvolvido pela Align Gestão de Negócios. Inclui DRE, Rolling Forecast,
análise de sensibilidade, indicadores financeiros e valuation DCF.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/martinsfelipef/dash_projecoes_dre.git)
Bash(git branch -M main && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(ssh -T git@github.com 2>&1)
Bash(ssh-keyscan github.com >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts 2>&1 && ssh -T git@github.com 2>&1)
Bash(git remote set-url origin git@github.com:martinsfelipef/dash_projecoes_dre.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
WebSearch
WebFetch(domain:github.com)
WebFetch(domain:docs.streamlit.io)
WebFetch(domain:pygithub.readthedocs.io)
WebFetch(domain:streamlit-authenticator.readthedocs.io)
Bash(pip show PyGithub 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "not installed")
Bash(python3 -m pip show streamlit-authenticator 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "not installed")
Bash(python3 -m pip show PyGithub 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "not installed")
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'utils'\); import app" 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && pip list 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "streamlit|auth|github|bcrypt")
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && pip install "streamlit-authenticator>=0.3.3" "PyGithub>=2.3.0" "bcrypt>=4.0.0" 2>&1 | tail -10)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'utils'\)
import streamlit_authenticator
import PyGithub
import bcrypt
print\('Todos os módulos OK'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import github; print\(github.__version__\)" 2>&1)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "from github import Github; print\('PyGithub OK'\)" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'utils'\)
import streamlit_authenticator
from github import Github
import bcrypt
print\('Todos os módulos OK'\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "WARNING\\|ScriptRunContext")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, 'utils'\)
os.environ['STREAMLIT_SERVER_HEADLESS'] = 'true'

# Testa o carregamento das funções sem rodar o app completo
import ast, tokenize, io

with open\('app.py', 'r'\) as f:
    source = f.read\(\)

try:
    ast.parse\(source\)
    print\('app.py: sintaxe OK'\)
except SyntaxError as e:
    print\(f'ERRO de sintaxe: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)
